mapper.select: SELECT d.*, e.actual_name as managerName, pd.`name` as parentName FROM t_department d left join t_employee e on d.manager_id= e.employee_id left join t_department pd on d.parent_id = pd.department_id where d.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} order by sort desc

SELECT d.*, e.actual_name as managerName, pd.`name` as parentName FROM t_department d left join t_employee e on d.manager_id= e.employee_id left join t_department pd on d.parent_id = pd.department_id where d.department_id = #{departmentId}
